chapter_title: Mental Health Practitioners in Secondary Schools
snippet: The Mental Health Practitioners (MHP) in Secondary Schools initiative provides vital support to all Victorian government secondary and specialist schools. The MHP initiative promotes positive mental health and wellbeing and address mental health concerns where they arise. Every Victorian government secondary school and specialist school with secondary-aged enrolments is now funded to employ an ongoing, school-based MHP. The MHP role provides a valuable extra resource to school's existing wellbeing teams and supports schools by: For further information, refer to the department’s Mental health practitioners in secondary schools External Link webpage.
